violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. State guidance provided to establishment during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Containers of baby formula were observed on retail shelves exceeding use by dates. Items were removed from retail sale and scanned out to be returned to purveyor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fanguards in reach-in coolers have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

Refuse disposing unit observed in poor repair. Bottom material was observed eroding. Receptacles and waste handling units fore refuse, recyclables, and returnables and for use with materials containing food residue shall be durable, cleanable, insect- and rodent-resistant, leakproof, and nonabsorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
